title: CCL - Selecting AI Noise Block
scenario: AI Noise Block option can be selected in Device Settings > Advanced for CCL-supported devices on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
Scroll down and tap on 'Advanced' under Device Settings.
Locate the 'AI Noise Block' option in the Advanced settings list.
Tap on the 'AI Noise Block' option to select it.
expected: The 'AI Noise Block' option is successfully selected (e.g., shows a checkmark, toggle enabled, or highlighted state) in Device Settings > Advanced for devices that support CCL.
